whatsnew: Audit-first: every check ships included, plus first-class sp_BLITZ CSV import — paste your existing sp_BLITZ output and see it merged with live findings on the Audit Assessment page.
Full Audit engagements: framework mappings, governance weighting, build catalogue, and the SQL Server cost estimator are delivered as a per-customer encrypted bundle.
Security: customer bundles ship encrypted (AES-256-GCM) next to sqltriage.exe and bind cryptographically to the customer name (GCM AAD watermark). No phone-home; everything works fully offline.
RAG retrieval: rag.db is distributed separately via secure share — drop the file next to sqltriage.exe to enable semantic search over the audit history.
Release packaging: LICENSE.txt now ships with the installer and appears as a wizard accept page. Curation artefacts and the stray measurement_*.json files no longer leak into release builds.
Boot-order: governance-weights.json no longer required at IConfiguration time; lazy-loaded from the active bundle. Removes the v0.90.1 hard failure when the file was missing.
